## Problem to Solve
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What is the user pain point? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- A clear description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Local-First Constraint Check
<!-- PromptMatrix is fiercely local-first. Check that your feature:
- Does NOT require mandatory external accounts or cloud services.
- Works with SQLite out of the box.
- Does not introduce hard dependencies on Redis, S3, or any third-party SaaS.
If your feature requires cloud services, note that it may belong in the Cloud tier instead. -->

- [ ] This feature works without any external accounts or cloud services.
- [ ] This feature works with the default SQLite database.

## Additional Context
<!-- Any mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain the request. -->
